ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blog_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blog post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the blog post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the blog post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the blog post */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the blog post was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the blog post was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the blog post (e.g., technology, lifestyle) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the blog post */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the blog post (e.g., published, draft) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blog_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blog post the comment was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., comment, reply, mention) */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if this is a reply) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES blog_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the reply was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the reply */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the comment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the comment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment or reply the flag was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the flag */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the flag */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the flag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role was assigned to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission assignment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission was assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reputation" (
  "reputation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reputation score */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the reputation score belongs to */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Reputation score of the user */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the reputation score was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reputation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reputation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment or reply the vote was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the vote */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., upvote, downvote) */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the vote was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_votes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_votes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment or reply the report was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment or reply the mention was made in */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the mention */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was mentioned */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date and time the mention was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_mentions_mentioned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_mentions_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)
